---
title: "Safe Refactor Stack"
---

# Safe Refactor Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://safe-refactor-stack/FFFD7C5D32`

**Enter:** Use when structure must improve without changing externally visible behavior.

| Step | Spell             | Artifact                                  | Advance when                                              |
| ---- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Freeze invariants | Behavior and data contracts               | What must not change is named                             |
| 2    | Characterize      | Tests or characterization evidence        | Current behavior is pinned                                |
| 3    | Reshape           | Structural patch                          | Structure improves without intentional behavior change    |
| 4    | Static verify     | Type, lint, and architecture check output | Static checks pass                                        |
| 5    | Behavior verify   | Characterization test output              | Behavior evidence stays green                             |
| 6    | Review            | Human review notes                        | No leaky abstractions, drift, or renamed confusion remain |

## Loop or Recursion

```json
{
  "steps": [
    3,
    4,
    5
  ],
  "until": "Desired structure is reached without invariant breakage"
}
```


## On Fail

Revert to the last green state and restate invariants more precisely.

## Why It Works

It puts behavioral contracts in front of structural ambition.
